project.name: scientific-ml-autoresearch
project.tagline: Evidence-aware auto-research workflow for scientific machine learning

workflow.title: Branch-first round planning
workflow.description: The planner allocates branch budget and evidence-run budget, then expands canonical branches into concrete evidence members.

workflow.title: Execution with recovery
workflow.description: The runner executes train/eval commands, resumes completed experiments, repairs invalid artifacts, and keeps provenance per run.

workflow.title: Scientific constraints and robustness
workflow.description: Constraints and robustness checks are recorded as structured evidence instead of being left as narrative reminders.

workflow.title: Evidence-centered reporting
workflow.description: The summary reports branch evidence, claim taxonomy, scientific check status, and the current best branch under aggregated evidence.

workflow.title: Evidence-gap-driven recommendation
workflow.description: Suggestions prioritize validation, ablation, or exploitation according to missing seed coverage, regime coverage, failed checks, and partial bundles.

planning: Two-level budgeting: branches per round + evidence runs per branch
Canonical branch identity removes seed and regime axes
Persisted evidence state can directly inform the next plan
